cluster_summaries.label: Flexibility & Care
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees frequently praise the company for respecting personal time and maintaining a healthy work-life balance.

cluster_summaries.label: Pay & Benefits
cluster_summaries.summary: Staff members highlight the quality of medical, retirement, and wellness benefits as a major positive.

cluster_summaries.label: Growth & Recognition
cluster_summaries.summary: While some find the work on innovative technology rewarding, others express frustration with leadership and recognition.

cluster_summaries.label: Culture & Belonging
cluster_summaries.summary: Many employees value the collaborative environment and the intelligence of their colleagues.

cluster_summaries.label: Safety & Fairness
cluster_summaries.summary: Feedback in this area is mixed, with some noting a culture of integrity while others report negative experiences with management.

cluster_summaries.label: Burnout & Workload
cluster_summaries.summary: Some staff report feeling underpaid and overworked, particularly in roles where they perceive a lack of strategic direction.

cluster_summaries.label: Work-Life Pressure
cluster_summaries.summary: A subset of employees reports that the workload can be overwhelming and inconsistent with work-life balance goals.

cluster_summaries.label: Stagnation
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees express concerns about limited career progression and feeling undervalued in their roles.

cluster_summaries.label: Unsafe or Unfair Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: Reports of internal politics, favoritism, and organizational silos negatively impact some employees' perceptions.

cluster_summaries.label: Disconnected Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: Some feedback suggests that organizational changes and competitive pressures can lead to feelings of disconnection.
